diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with type definitions and class implementation
+- Neighbor files: None in this file (imports external types only)
+- Safe summary: Factory helper exports Factory class for creating apps and middleware with typed handlers supporting 1-10 handler combinations
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with route inspection utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/request/constants, src/utils/url
+- Safe summary: Route helper provides functions to inspect matched routes and path information in handlers using Context object
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with WebSocket helper implementation
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for upgrading connections with event handling and WSContext class for message control
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, getSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, generateCookie, deleteCookie, generateSignedCookie
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with cookie parsing and setting functions
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper provides read/set operations for signed and unsigned cookies with secure and host prefix support
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with client generation for testing
+- Neighbor files: src/client, src/context, src/types
+- Safe summary: Testing helper creates typed HTTP client for Hono apps using client package with custom fetch interception
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with runtime detection and environment access
+- Neighbor files: None in this file
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper detects runtime environment (node/deno/bun/workerd/fastly) and provides typed environment access
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with CSS-in-JS helper for server rendering
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/helper/jsx
+- Safe summary: CSS helper provides template string-based styling with class name generation, keyframes, and view transitions
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, toHash, minify
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with CSS utility functions
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css
+- Safe summary: CSS common utilities providing hash generation, class building, minification, and view transition support for CSS helper
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with Proxy fetch function
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper wraps fetch API for request forwarding with hop-by-hop header handling and RFC compliance options
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with route inspection utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Dev helper inspects and displays app routes with method, path, and handler information with optional colors
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with HTML templating function
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
+- Safe summary: HTML helper provides template string-based HTML building with auto-escaping and callback support for async rendering
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: re-exports from ssg, middleware, and plugins
+- Reads as: TypeScript module delegating to sub-modules
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG helper index exports static site generation functions from sub-modules for centralized access
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, SSGPlugin, ToSSGOptions, ToSSGResult
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with static site generation implementation
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/utils, src/client/utils
+- Safe summary: SSG core handles fetching route contents with concurrency control and saving files using FileSystemModule interface
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with path utilities for SSG
+- Neighbor files: src/router, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: SSG utility functions for path manipulation, route filtering, and security checks against path traversal attacks
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with SSG middleware functions
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware adds context flags to requests and provides guards for static generation boundaries
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: TypeScript module delegating to sub-modules
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper exports stream, SSE, and text streaming functions from sub-modules for centralized access
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with base streaming function
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/stream
+- Safe summary: Stream helper creates TransformStream-based streaming responses with error handling and Bun version compatibility
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: TypeScript module with Server-Sen
